Our Heritage

A family recipe,
made with love.

Cecilia Bakery was born from a promise — that every cake coming out of our kitchen would carry the flavor of home. Founded by Cecilia herself, the bakery grew from a beloved neighborhood staple into a trusted name across the region, now guided by owner Alejandro Dominguez.

Over 20 years and two generations later, nothing has changed about how we bake. Every cake is handcrafted with the same recipes, the same meringue, the same heart. We just reach more tables now.

— Alejandro Dominguez, Owner

20+ years of flavor Two Generations · One Recipe

"Que cada bizcocho
sepa a hogar."

Wholesale

Wholesale Program

Bringing our flavor
to your shelves.

We supply supermarkets, restaurants, grocery stores, and more across the region — delivering fresh Dominican cakes on a consistent schedule. If you sell food people love, let's talk.

Become a Partner
Supermarkets

Consistent delivery, reliable supply, packaging that moves off the shelf.

Restaurants

Bulk and custom orders for dessert programs and special events.

Grocery Stores

Neighborhood stores that want authentic Dominican flavor on their shelves.

Events & Catering

Quinceañeras, birthdays, corporate — we bring the cake.
